checkin_form.name: Guest Name
checkin_form.name_placeholder: Please enter the exact name used at booking.
checkin_form.name_required: Please enter the exact name used at booking.

fail_exceed.desc:
You are viewing the {branch} Branch.
Please check your reservation location.

already.desc: For guest protection and safety, room details are provided only once initially, and can be accessed via email.

double.desc:
For accurate room information, please
contact us via the details below or
through our messenger.

{tel}

info_input.email_verify_help: If you don't see the verification email, check your spam folder.
info_input.email_verify_timeout: If it doesn't arrive within 5 minutes, try verifying with a different email address.
info_input.how: How did you hear about WECO STAY? (optional)
info_input.agree_required: (Required) For guest protection and safety, room details are provided only once initially, and can be accessed later via email.
info_input.agree_option: (Optional) By agreeing to receive marketing information, you'll be the first to get WECO STAY news and special offers.

error.message:
Something went wrong.
Taking you back to the first page.

room_info.title:
{name}'s
Room Information
room_info.text1: For guest protection and safety, room information is provided only once. Please save the image or re-check via email.
room_info.text2: Room information is available from 11:00 AM on the check-in date, and the room password will be activated automatically from 4:00 PM (check-in time).
room_info.text3: Early check-in and late check-out are available at an additional cost of 10,000 KRW per hour. Availability depends on room conditions, so please contact the office for inquiries.
room_info.save_img_desc: Check the Gallery app on Android or the Files app on iOS.

login_form.name: Guest Name
login_form.name_placeholder: Please enter the exact name used at booking.
login_form.name_required: Please enter the exact name used at booking.

storage_info.title: Luggage Storage Password
storage_info.text: The luggage storage password is valid until midnight of the same day and changes daily.
